title: lactuca serriola subsp. integrifolia
intro: Lactuca serriola subsp. integrifolia, also known as wild lettuce or prickly lettuce, is a subspecies of the Lactuca serriola plant, characterized by its single, undivided leaf and ability to grow in dry and poor soil conditions. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in relieving insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness due to its sedative and anxiolytic effects. The health benefits of Lactuca serriola subsp. integrifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
